description: Folds a circular sheet into a cylinder. Animates the sheet rolling into a cylindrical 3D shape with optional height specification.
utility: Fold a circular sheet into a cylinder

arguments.name: sheetCircle
arguments.description: Reference to the circular sheet to fold

examples.expression:
sc_1 = sheetcircle(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
cyl_1 = cylinderfold(at(4,22), sc_1, 5, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

sc_1 = sheetcircle(at(4,4), view(14,14), 4, c(crimson), fc(cyan), fo(0.3))
cyl_1 = cylinderfold(at(4,22), sc_1, c(crimson), fc(cyan), fo(0.3))
